info.name: FindMahir Demoapp API
info.description:
Find Mahir API: Auth (USER, MAHIR; ADMIN only via DB/seed), JWT includes **role** claim (re-login after backend upgrade). Jobs, Bids, Bookings, Chat, Notifications, Users, Mahirs, Reviews. **MAHIR** accounts are stored as **FREEMIUM** at signup and when admin creates a Mahir; use membership for premium Mahir plans.

**Public (no auth):** GET /api/categories, /api/mahirs, /api/faqs, GET /api/membership-plans, **GET /api/banners** (optional Bearer refines USER/MAHIR audience).

**Users (auth):** GET/POST **/api/users/me/membership** (subscribe, cancel). **Account settings:** GET/PATCH **/api/users/me/notification-preferences**; POST multipart **/api/users/me/profile-picture** (field `file`); DELETE **/api/users/me/profile-picture**; public GET **/api/files/avatars/{userId}**; POST **/api/users/me/change-password**; POST **/api/users/me/deactivate**; DELETE **/api/users/me** or POST **/api/users/me/delete** with `{ "confirm": "DELETE" }`. User objects include **profilePictureUrl** (and avatarUrl). **Auth:** POST **/auth/logout** (client discards JWTs).

**Admin:** Bearer token with ROLE_ADMIN — folder **Admin** → /api/admin/* including **dashboard** (summary, engagement), **banners** CRUD + **POST /api/admin/banners/upload** (multipart `file` → imageUrl), public GET **/api/files/banners/{uuid.ext}**, users (search, patch, create, delete), user membership detail/patch/revoke, jobs/reviews patch, support chat detail, FAQs & plans PUT+PATCH.

**baseUrl:** Collection variable. Change to your VPS, Railway, or http://localhost:8080.

**Setup:** Sign In; use Bearer {{accessToken}}. Variables: userId, mahirId, jobId, bidId, bookingId, threadId (booking chat), **supportThreadId** (in-app support), notificationId, reviewId, planId, faqId, bannerId. **Support:** USER/MAHIR → folder **Support in-app** (`/api/support/chats`); ADMIN → **Admin** support endpoints (same thread id). **Admin jobs:** GET/PATCH/DELETE `/api/admin/jobs/{id}` (moderation: hiddenFromPublic, moderationBlocked, title/description). **Categories:** canonical names incl. **Other** — see Get All Categories. **Hire from profile:** POST `/api/users/{mahirId}/hire-invite` (USER only) → use `chatThreadId` with chat APIs. **Bid apply:** POST bid response includes `chatThreadId` for messaging before accept. Seed admin (sample data): admin.portal@findmahir.app / Password123!

request.description: Register as Find Mahir (customer). Role USER. Saves tokens to collection variables.

Register as Become Mahir (professional). Backend always stores MAHIR as **FREEMIUM** at signup (even if client sends PREMIUM). MAHIR gets 3 credits for WhatsApp contact. Upgrade via membership/admin as needed.
BLOCKED by API: public signup as ADMIN returns error. Create ADMIN in DB or use sample-data seed user admin.portal@findmahir.app. Kept for documentation only.
Login as seed Platform Admin (only if sample data ran: APP_SAMPLE_DATA or H2). JWT must include role ADMIN for /api/admin/*. Change password in production.
Login for USER or MAHIR (and ADMIN if created in DB). Token includes **role** — required for admin routes. Saves tokens to collection variables.
Request password reset. If email exists, a reset link is sent (or logged if SMTP not configured).
Set new password using token from forgot-password email/link. Set resetToken variable from the link.
Get new access and refresh tokens.
Validate token and return current user (includes **profilePictureUrl** / **avatarUrl** when set).
Logout success message. JWTs are stateless — discard access/refresh tokens on the client; no server-side token store to invalidate.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Need maths tutor, 2 hours",
  "description": "Looking for a tutor for grade 10 maths.",
  "categoryId": 1,
  "location": {
    "streetAddress": "Block 5, Karachi",
    "latitude": 24.8,
    "longitude": 67.05
  },
  "scheduledAt": "2025-03-15T14:00:00",
  "budgetMin": 800,
  "budgetMax": 1000,
  "durationHours": 2
}

request.description: USER posts a job (open for bids). Saves jobId. categoryId from GET /api/categories.
USER: list my posted jobs. Response includes bidCount per job. Add &status=OPEN or ASSIGNED etc.
MAHIR: list open jobs. Response includes bidCount per job. Add &categoryId=1 to filter.
Job detail: poster, category, location, budget, status, bidCount.
MAHIR only. Uses 1 credit; returns posterPhoneNumber and remainingCredits. Fails if no credits (use Apply instead).
USER can update only if status=OPEN and no accepted bid.
USER cancels job (only if OPEN).

MAHIR applies to a job. Message required; proposedPrice, proposedAt (ISO-8601), estimatedDurationHours optional. One bid per Mahir per job. Saves bidId. Response includes **chatThreadId** — poster and Mahir can message before bid accept; thread is tied to a PENDING booking.
Poster: all bids for this job. MAHIR: only their own bid. Others get 403.
MAHIR only (403 for others). List my bids. Add &status=PENDING or ACCEPTED etc.
USER accepts one bid. Creates booking + chat thread. Rejects other bids. Saves bookingId, threadId.
USER rejects a bid.

Canonical service categories (exact names for Flutter `AppServiceCategories`): Home Cleaning, Electrician, Plumbing, AC Services, Appliance Repair, Carpentry, Painting & Renovation, Pest Control, Home Shifting, Handyman Services, Delivery Boy, Home Cheff, Cleaner, Teachers, Makeup Artist, Driver, **Other**. Match jobs/Mahir signup by **id**. No auth.
Active FAQs for Help/FAQ screen. No auth.
Active plans for pricing/subscribe UI. Filter client-side by audience (USER, MAHIR, BOTH). No auth.
Active home banners for app (audience BOTH, or USER/MAHIR if Bearer token sent). No auth required.
Search Mahirs. Add ?categoryId=1 to filter by category. Paginated; returns averageRating and reviewCount. No auth.
Get one Mahir by ID with average rating and review count. No auth required.
Get current user profile (includes credits for MAHIR, **avatarUrl**, **profilePictureUrl**). Requires Bearer token.
Update current user profile. All fields optional. MAHIR can set serviceCategoryIds and customServiceName.

USER (customer) only. Sends hire invitation to Mahir (path = {{mahirId}}); Mahir gets notification type HIRE_INVITE. Response is a BookingResponse with **chatThreadId** — use existing chat APIs (GET/POST /api/chats/{threadId}/messages). Empty body `{}` or omit body is allowed; message is optional. Reuses active direct (no-job) booking between same pair if one exists.

Store FCM token for push notifications. App calls this after login with the device token from Firebase. When backend creates a notification, it also sends FCM push to this token. See docs/FIREBASE_PUSH_SETUP.md.
Current plan, active membership row, and history. USER/MAHIR; empty for ADMIN.
Subscribe to planId (must match role vs plan audience). Cancels previous active membership. Set planId from GET /api/membership-plans.
Cancels current ACTIVE membership for the logged-in user.
Returns four booleans: inboxMessages, ratingReminders, promotionsAndTips, yourAccount. Defaults to all true if no row exists yet.
Partial update. Backend uses these flags before sending FCM pushes (mapped by notification type).

formdata.description: JPEG, PNG, or WebP; max 5 MB

request.description: Multipart field name must be **file**. 200: { "profilePictureUrl": "..." }. Same URL pattern as GET /api/files/avatars/{{userId}}.
Removes stored image files; user profile then has null profilePictureUrl/avatarUrl.
Public download of the avatar binary. No Bearer required. Path has no extension; server picks jpg/png/webp on disk.
Authenticated password change. For email reset flow use Auth > Forgot/Reset Password.
Marks account deactivated (optional reason). Then call Logout and clear local session.
Deletes the authenticated user (not the same as DELETE /api/users/{{userId}} legacy). 200 OK — clear tokens on client.
Alternative to DELETE /api/users/me: body must be exactly { "confirm": "DELETE" }.
Create user (legacy; for full signup use Auth > Sign Up). Requires Bearer token.
List all users (paginated). Requires Bearer token.
Get user by ID. Uses collection variable userId.
Public profile (no email/phone): fullName, avatarUrl, bio, rating, reviewCount, services. For viewing Mahir/customer before accepting bid.
Update user. Password optional.
Delete user. Only own account allowed.
Create a booking (USER only). Set mahirId from Search Mahirs. Saves bookingId to collection.
List my bookings. Add &status=ACCEPTED or REACHED or IN_PROGRESS or COMPLETED or CANCELLED to filter.
Get one booking. Only customer or assigned Mahir can access.
USER (job poster) only. Set when Mahir has reached or agreed on chat (time/place).
USER (job poster) only. Set when job is working / in progress.
USER (job poster) only. Set when job is done. Customer can then leave a review.
Customer or Mahir cancels the booking.
Cancel booking with optional reason. Notifies the other party.

item.name: Get or Create Chat Thread for Booking

request.description: Get or create chat thread for this booking. Returns threadId. Saves to collection.
List my chat threads. Response: threadId, otherPartyName, lastMessagePreview, lastMessageAt, unreadCount. After bid accept, thread appears for both customer and Mahir.
Paginated message history for a thread.
Send a message in the booking chat. Other party gets notification.
**USER or MAHIR** only. In-app support threads (not booking chat). Same **threadId** as admin support inbox. Saves **supportThreadId**.
Creates a new support thread for the current user. **201** — saves **supportThreadId**.
Thread summary (owner only). Set **supportThreadId**.
Paged messages. Optional fields: **senderRole**, **fromAdmin**, **sentAt** (mirrors createdAt).
**201** — user reply in support thread. Body: `{ "content": "..." }` (required, max 4000).

Paginated: title, body, type, relatedId (e.g. bookingId, jobId, **support threadId**), read, createdAt. Types include: NEW_JOB, BID_*, BOOKING_*, CHAT_MESSAGE, **HIRE_INVITE** (relatedId=bookingId), NEW_REVIEW, …
Returns { "count": number }.
Mark a notification as read. Uses notificationId (set by List My Notifications) or set variable manually.

Send a push notification to a specific FCM device token. No auth. Replace FCM_DEVICE_TOKEN with a real token from the app (e.g. after POST /api/users/me/fcm-token). 200 = sent (messageId); 503 = Firebase not initialized; 400 = invalid/expired token.
Leave a review for a completed booking (USER/customer only). One review per booking.
List reviews for a Mahir. No auth required. Paginated.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Requires Bearer {{accessToken}} from an ADMIN user. Use Auth > Sign In (seed ADMIN) after sample data, or your own admin account.

request.description: Counts: users by role, jobs, open jobs, bookings, completed bookings, reviews, chat messages last 7 days, active valid banners.
Optional query: from, to (ISO date). Default last 14 days. Returns chatMessagesByDay and newRegistrationsByDay.
Paged banners (sortOrder). Saves first bannerId.

formdata.description: JPEG, PNG, or WebP; max 5 MB

request.description: ADMIN only. Field name **file**. 200: { imageUrl, url, path } — use imageUrl (or url) as imageUrl when calling Create/Update Banner. Public GET: /api/files/banners/{uuid.ext}
audience: USER | MAHIR | BOTH. For imageUrl use **Upload Banner Image** first or any HTTPS URL. Saves bannerId.
Partial update. Set bannerId.
Same handler as PATCH; send all fields you want stored.
Hard delete banner.
Paged users. Query: search (email/fullName), role=USER|MAHIR|ADMIN, blocked=true|false. Remove empty search= if unused.
Profile + blocked flags, job/review counts, membership history. Set userId.
Create USER or MAHIR only (not ADMIN). For MAHIR set serviceCategoryIds and optional customServiceName. Saves userId.

Partial update. **accountStatus:** ACTIVE | ON_HOLD | DEACTIVATED. **Mahir:** `accountType` / `account_type` (FREEMIUM | PREMIUM), `credits` / `credit_balance`. **blocked**, blockedReason, fullName, email, phoneNumber. Omit fields you do not change.
`{ "blocked": true, "reason": "..." }` — **reason** or **blocked_reason**. Cannot block ADMIN.
Cannot delete ADMIN. Fails if user has jobs, bids, or bookings.
All jobs (newest first). Response includes **hiddenFromPublic**, **moderationBlocked**, bidCount, poster. Saves first **jobId**.
Full job for moderation UI. Set **jobId**.

body.raw:
{
  "status": "OPEN",
  "title": "Updated title",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "hiddenFromPublic": false,
  "moderationBlocked": false,
  "feedVisible": true,
  "publiclyVisible": true
}

request.description: Partial update; unknown JSON keys ignored. **status:** OPEN | ASSIGNED | CANCELLED | COMPLETED. **Copy:** title / jobTitle, description / jobDescription. **Hide from Mahir job feed:** hiddenFromPublic, hidden, adminHidden, or feedVisible/publiclyVisible=false. **Block:** moderationBlocked, jobBlocked, blocked (job). Set **jobId**.
**204** — removes job and related bookings/bids/chat (destructive). Set **jobId**.
All reviews including hiddenFromPublic. Saves first reviewId to variable.
Hide/show review on public Mahir profile. Set reviewId (e.g. from List All Reviews).
Moderation: visibility, rating (1-5), comment. Omit fields you do not change.
**In-app support** threads (USER/MAHIR ↔ admin). **Not** booking chat. Saves first **supportThreadId** (same id as `/api/support/chats`).
**type** = SUPPORT. **userId** / **userRole** = participant for profile deep-link. **id** = **threadId**. Set **supportThreadId**.
Paged messages. **senderRole**, **fromAdmin**, **sentAt** on each message. Set **supportThreadId**.
**201** — admin sends reply. Body `{ "content": "..." }`. Caller must be **ADMIN** JWT. Set **supportThreadId**.
All FAQs including inactive. Sets faqId from first item if array returned.
Creates FAQ; saves faqId.
Partial update. Set faqId.
Same as PATCH handler; send fields to merge.
Hard delete FAQ.
All plans including inactive. Sets planId from first plan.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Mahir Pro",
  "code": "MAHIR_PRO",
  "description": "Featured listing and extra credits",
  "audience": "MAHIR",
  "priceMonthly": 29.99,
  "currency": "TND",
  "featuresText": "Featured profile; 10 credits/month",
  "active": true,
  "sortOrder": 0
}

request.description: audience: USER | MAHIR | BOTH. Saves planId.
Partial update. Set planId.
Same as PATCH handler; send fields to merge.
Soft delete: sets active=false.
Paged membership rows (user, plan, status, dates).
Cancels previous ACTIVE membership for this user. planId must match user role vs plan audience. expiresAt optional ISO instant.
Cancels current ACTIVE membership for userId.
**200** — `active` + `history`. **404** if user has never had any membership row (no active and empty history).
**planId** + optional **expiresAt** (replace active plan). **expiresAt** only (active row). **credits** (Mahir only): set WhatsApp credit balance without changing plan.
Alias of DELETE .../membership — cancels active membership.
